title: disable lws close
text: disable lws close Keep the master connection open after ending a lightweight session USYS$ORA_PARAMS = disable lws close USYS$ORA_PARAMS = dlc Use This option is only effective when using lightweight sessions. Description By default the master connection is closed when the last lightweight session is ended. To keep the master connection open this option needs to be set. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
